headline: Can ServiceNow's Expanded AI 'Control Tower' Role Reinforce Its Regulated-Industry Moat For NOW?
summary: In early March 2026, ServiceNow expanded its AI portfolio with EmployeeWorks and Autonomous Workforce for public sector clients, while partners including Autonomize AI, 1Kosmos, Contrast Security, NTT DOCOMO, and StarHub announced new integrations and joint solutions embedding ServiceNow’s AI Platform into healthcare, security, telecom, and identity workflows. These moves deepen ServiceNow’s role as an AI “control tower” across regulated industries, strengthening its position at the center...
